name: AI-Assisted Test Generation
description: Test generation is repetitive but critical. Developers skip tests because writing edge cases is tedious. AI agents can generate tests quickly but often produce brittle, unrealistic tests that provide false confidence. Tests that mock internals, use fake data like "foo@example.com", or test implementation details break on every refactor.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Geração de Teste Assistida por IA
pt-BR.description: Escreva testes sistematicamente para reduzir regressões, aumentar cobertura e prevenir refatorações acidentais.
